_comment: Reproduces Table 1 of the NeurIPS 2026 paper (tab:mega): SOTA comparison on FB A∪B. Paper numbers (Market/Data/All BI*100): BLF+crowd+emp+cal 85.2/62.4/73.8; Cassi 82.0/59.6/70.8; GPT-5(zs+crowd) 80.4/60.1/70.2; Grok 77.6/61.4/69.5; Foresight 82.3/57.6/70.0; Crowd+emp(no LLM) 81.5/58.3/69.9.
